name: hide-unverified-x
description: Filter X posts by verification badge and About this account metadata.

scripts.build: npm run prepare:chrome && npm run build:chrome && npm run prepare:safari && npm run prepare:firefox && npm run build:firefox
scripts.sign:firefox: npm run prepare:firefox && web-ext sign --source-dir dist/sideload/firefox --artifacts-dir dist --channel unlisted --approval-timeout 0
